title: Mar Mar's Enhanced Stairs & Slabs
description: Build more than ever with more variety of stairs, slabs and walls. With Mar Mar's Enhanced stairs & slabs, you can be as creative as your imagination lets you.
body:
### Build with more creativity than ever with Enhanced Stairs & Slabs

![Mar Mar´s Enhanced Stairs & Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9d23ec57581b59ac1b40446ab06e2d0e3936cf.png)
--
This mod adds a stair, slab and wall variety to almost every vanilla block that is used on building. This includes strange blocks like Calcite or Drip´stone, barely used on building.

All the variants can be crafted both on the Crafting Table and the Stonecutter.

**_List of blocks with variants:_**
*   Stone, Polished diorite, Polished andesite, Polished granite, Quartz and Smooth quartz -> new wall
*   Prismarine bricks and Dark prismarine -> new wall
*   Smooth sandstone and Smooth red sandstone -> new wall 
*   Cut sandstone and Cut red sandstone -> new stairs and wall
*   Deepslate, Calcite, Dripstone, Smooth basalt, Netherrack, Quartz bricks and End stone -> new stairs, slab and wall
*   All Concrete colors -> new stairs, slab and wall
*   All Terracotta colors -> new stairs, slab and wall
